hooks.command: terminal-notifier -message "Claude has a question in $(basename $PWD)" -title "Claude Code" -activate com.microsoft.VSCode -contentImage "/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Resources/Code.icns"

terminal-notifier -message "Plan ready for review in $(basename $PWD)" -title "Claude Code" -activate com.microsoft.VSCode -contentImage "/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Resources/Code.icns"

terminal-notifier -message "Permission required in $(basename $PWD)" -title "Claude Code" -activate com.microsoft.VSCode -contentImage "/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Resources/Code.icns"
terminal-notifier -message "Task completed in $(basename $PWD)" -title "Claude Code" -activate com.microsoft.VSCode -contentImage "/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Resources/Code.icns"
